error_signature: execution time limit on n8n Cloud
title: Execution time limit on n8n Cloud
symptom: The workflow does not complete due to exceeding the execution time limit set by n8n Cloud.
applies_when: Using long wait times in workflows
root_cause: n8n Cloud imposes execution time limits on workflows to manage resources. If a workflow exceeds this limit, it will not complete, causing the wait node to hang indefinitely.
fix_steps: Use the Schedule Trigger node to start the workflow at a specific time instead of using the wait node
Adjust the workflow logic to accommodate the scheduled start
agent_instruction: Implement a Schedule Trigger node to manage timing instead of relying on the wait node.
